meaning: adj.紧的,绷紧的,紧密的,不漏水(不透气)的,由压迫产生的,困难的,吝啬的,严厉的adv.紧紧地
examples: It's too tight across the back.
Microsoft is an oft-mentioned suitor for Nokia, but the two already have a tight licensing relationship.
Tight security arrangements have been made with barricades set up in different parts of the city.
